case_title: MIGUEL PACHECO VS. HANA ZEN, INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACHECO, MIGUEL AS TO DEFENDANT HANA ZEN, INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION FAIRVIEW ENTERPRISES (CA),LTD,A CALIFORNIA CORP. JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACHECO, MIGUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANA ZEN, INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION FAIRVIEW ENTERPRISES (CA),LTD,A CALIFORNIA CORP. JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY $15,516.03 PRINCIPAL, $325.08 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,141.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
